prompts.name: Summer Festival
prompts.text: Create a summer festival scene with lanterns, stalls, yukata-inspired clothing, warm evening light, and cheerful crowd energy.

prompts.name: Fireworks Night
prompts.text: Create a fireworks-night scene with colorful bursts in the sky, soft glow on faces, and festive atmosphere.

prompts.name: School Festival
prompts.text: Create a school festival scene with decorated stalls, handmade signs kept unreadable, students, and playful campus energy.

prompts.name: Masquerade Ball
prompts.text: Create a masquerade ball scene with elegant masks, formal clothing, chandeliers, and refined mystery.

prompts.name: Royal Ceremony
prompts.text: Create a royal ceremony with grand halls, banners, formal posture, polished floors, and dignified atmosphere.

prompts.name: Winter Holiday
prompts.text: Create a winter holiday scene with warm lights, snow outside, cozy decorations, and festive comfort.

prompts.name: Spring Picnic
prompts.text: Create a spring picnic scene with blanket, basket, blossoms, soft grass, and relaxed outdoor warmth.

prompts.name: Music Concert
prompts.text: Create a music concert scene with stage lights, crowd silhouettes, instruments, and performance energy.

prompts.name: Fashion Show
prompts.text: Create a fashion show scene with runway lighting, confident walking pose, polished outfit detail, and editorial presentation.

prompts.name: Market Day
prompts.text: Create a market-day scene with stalls, produce, fabrics, casual crowd movement, and lively everyday detail.

prompts.name: Cafe Meetup
prompts.text: Create a casual café meetup with drinks, table details, warm light, and friendly social mood.

prompts.name: Graduation
prompts.text: Create a graduation scene with formal clothing, celebratory posture, soft pride, and clean ceremony detail.

prompts.name: Tea Ceremony
prompts.text: Create a tea ceremony scene with careful posture, traditional objects, calm rhythm, and refined cultural atmosphere.

prompts.name: Night Parade
prompts.text: Create a night parade with lanterns, performers, decorative clothing, crowd depth, and colorful motion.

prompts.name: Stargazing
prompts.text: Create a stargazing event with blankets, telescope, night sky, quiet wonder, and soft cool lighting.
